docs.title: Home
docs.text:
AlmaLinux Media & Entertainment SIG Works On Database

Community hardware reports — privacy-first, no hostnames or serials collected.

2 Reports 2 Unique GPUs 1 Platform Submit your rig → 01 — Run One command Runs locally on your AlmaLinux workstation. Collects hardware info, writes a JSON file, and copies it to your clipboard automatically. bash <(curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KernelChief/almalinux-me-hardware-catalog/main/scripts/almalinux-me-hardware-survey-reporter.sh) 02 — Submit Paste & go The script opens the GitHub issue form automatically. Paste the JSON from your clipboard and hit submit — that's all. Open form → 03 — Published You're in A maintainer reviews and approves. Your hardware report appears in this database automatically — searchable by everyone. Browse results → Recent Reports See all → Report ID Timestamp (UTC) System Processor Memory (GB) GPU 0bc8b9bc 2026-01-30T18:22:32Z AMD Ryzen Threadripper 3970X 32-Core Processor 125 NVIDIA Corporation GA106 [GeForce RTX 3060] (rev a1) d79d017f 2026-01-30T09:27:43Z AMD Ryzen 3 4100 4-Core Processor 62 NVIDIA Corporation GB202 [GeForce RTX 5090] (rev a1)
